name: oss-thanks
description: Track GitHub repositories used by AI coding agents and thank maintainers through review or explicit auto-star mode.

interface.shortDescription: Review or star OSS projects used by agents
interface.longDescription: Record GitHub repositories referenced, cloned, or downloaded by AI coding agents. Keep review mode as the default queue for user approval, or enable explicit auto-star mode when the user wants repositories starred immediately from their GitHub account.
defaultPrompt: Track open-source repositories used in this task
Review the OSS thanks queue before finishing
Enable explicit auto-star mode for this project
